headline: Keysight Ties GlobalFoundries Photonics To ADS For Data Center Design
summary: Keysight Technologies (NYSE:KEYS) is adding support for GlobalFoundries’ silicon photonics process to its ADS Photonic Designer platform. The update enables combined photonic and electronic system simulation for photonic integrated circuits in a single design environment. The integration is aimed at helping engineers validate full electro optical electrical systems and address design bottlenecks before tapeout.
